scripts.build:server: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @neivara/server
scripts.build:client: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @neivara/client
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @neivara/server && npm run build --workspace @neivara/client
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --workspace @neivara/server" "npm run dev --workspace @neivara/client"
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @neivara/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @neivara/client
